chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1865 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-16639/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 07.12.2016. None present for the petitioners nor there is any intimation on behalf of their Counsel. On last date of hearing, notices were issued to the respondents with the direction that no harassment should be caused to the petitioners. Learned A.A.G has already filed a statement, wherein it is stated that police officials will discharge their functions strictly in accordance with law. This petition is disposed of with the directions that respondents will not cause any harassment to the petitioners and will only discharge their duties/functions in a fair, just and reasonable manner. JUDGE Shahid
